title: critonia quadrangularis
intro: Critonia quadrangularis, also known as 'Yerba de San Antonio', is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Critonia quadrangularis include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and provide relief from pain and discomfort. The plant is often prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or used in herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
